---
title: "Lennard Naumann"
image: portrait.jpg
page-navigation: false
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 50%
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/lennardnau
      text: Git
    - icon: google
      href: https://scholar.google.de/citations?user=HitgLnwAAAAJ&hl=de&oi=ao
      text: Google Scholar
    - href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4261-1080
      text: ORCID
---



:::{#hero-heading}

Hi! I'm a researcher in the [Institutions and Political Inequality unit](https://www.wzb.eu/en/research/political-economy-of-development/institutions-and-political-inequality) at the WZB Berlin Social Science Center, and an affiliated member of the Research Training Group [DYNAMICS](https://www.sowi.hu-berlin.de/en/dynamics).

My work focuses on prejudice and avoidance across ethnic and political divides: why people steer clear of those they see as different, and what this implies for how we live together as a society. To study this, I use experimental and observational causal inference methods. In addition, I am interested in webscraping and the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) in the social sciences.

Feel free to [get in touch!](mailto:lennard.naumann@wzb.eu)



```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: 'asis'

library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(readxl)

df <- read_xlsx("projects.xlsx")
df$id <- 1:nrow(df)

for (cat_name in unique(df$category)) {
  cat("\n#### ", cat_name, "\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("<hr>")
  df.cat <- filter(df, category == cat_name)

  for (i in 1:nrow(df.cat)) {
    # Authors in parentheses, plain text (no links, no italics)
    auth_vec <- str_split(df.cat$authors[i], ",", simplify = TRUE) |> str_squish()
    if (df.cat$authors[i] == "." || all(auth_vec == "")) {
      authors <- ""
    } else if (length(auth_vec) == 1) {
      authors <- paste0(" (with ", auth_vec, ").")
    } else if (length(auth_vec) == 2) {
      authors <- paste0(" (with ", paste(auth_vec, collapse = " and "), ").")
    } else {
      authors <- paste0(" (with ",
                        paste(auth_vec[-length(auth_vec)], collapse = ", "),
                        ", and ", last(auth_vec), ").")
    }

    # Title is a link only when a link is available
    title <- if (df.cat$link[i] == ".") {
      paste0("<strong>", df.cat$title[i], "</strong>")
    } else {
      paste0('<a href="', df.cat$link[i], '"><strong>', df.cat$title[i], '</strong></a>')
    }

    journal <- ifelse(df.cat$journal[i] == ".", "",
                      paste0(" <em>", df.cat$journal[i], "</em>"))
    prereg  <- ifelse(df.cat$prereg[i] == ".", "",
                      paste0("&nbsp;<a href=", df.cat$prereg[i], ">[Preregistration]</a>"))
    pap     <- ifelse(df.cat$pap[i] == ".", "",
                      paste0("&nbsp;<a href=", df.cat$pap[i], ">[PAP]</a>"))

    entry <- glue(
      '{title}{authors}{journal}
      <a href="#" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapse{df.cat$id[i]}" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="collapse{df.cat$id[i]}">[Abstract]</a> {prereg} {pap}
      <div class="collapse" id="collapse{df.cat$id[i]}"><div class="card card-body" style="font-size: 0.9em; text-align: justify;">{df.cat$abstract[i]}</div></div>'
    ) |> str_replace_all("\\n\\s*", " ")

    cat("- ", entry, "\n", sep = "")
  }

  cat("\n")
}

```
